resources.title: How to use this branch
resources.note: Append-only operating log for meaningful milestones/decisions/incidents. Create one child node per event with ISO timestamp prefix in label (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM). Keep entries concise and factual: what happened, impact, next action. Do not rewrite old entries; append corrections as new nodes.

resources.title: Outcome
resources.note: Created frozen release from uploaded full-state JSON and synced to main + gh-pages. Artifacts: releases/global-configurator-live-2026-04-23-1950.html, releases/global-configurator-state-2026-04-23-1950.json, releases/global-configurator-live.latest.json.

resources.title: Backup
resources.note: Before migration, complete Clawdbot backup created at ~/migration-backups/2026-04-23-202634/.clawdbot (size ~1.5G). Rollback path preserved.

nodes.label: 2026-04-23 20:39 — OpenAI Codex OAuth completed on James

resources.title: Auth status
resources.note: OpenClaw auth profile added: openai-codex:globalnativeorg@gmail.com (oauth). Default model switched to openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex.

resources.title: Doctor + status
resources.note: Ran doctor-driven repair flow, installed openclaw-gateway systemd service, fixed credentials permissions (chmod 700), probe reachable, Telegram healthy.

resources.title: Pairing
resources.note: Resolved repeated TUI pairing issue by approving pending scope-upgrade request ID from second terminal. Reconnect then succeeded.

resources.title: Approach
resources.note: Agreed two-stage James onboarding for Global Configurator: (1) read-only orientation + change summary, (2) one bounded first task. Avoid stale-context edits.

nodes.label: Procedure — both Andy and James must append chronology

resources.title: Operating rule
resources.note: For every meaningful chat/action: append one chronology node (timestamp + title + impact + next action). Minimum cadence: add before session close or lock release. If missed, add catch-up entry first at next opportunity.
